title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen
scenario: DFU update via app shows progress bar and warning message about call interruptions after tapping "Update" and "Start update"
steps: Open the app and navigate to the DFU (Device Firmware Update) section.
expected: The updating screen should be shown with a progress bar and a message: "Answering a call may interrupt the update and require you to restart the update once the call ends. To avoid interruptions, we recommend completing the update before using your device for calls."
